inputs.label: Current Loan Balance
inputs.businessContext: The outstanding principal balance of the mortgage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The outstanding principal balance of the mortgage.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Solde principal impayé du prêt hypothécaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Saldo principal pendiente de la hipoteca.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: The annual interest rate on the loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: The annual interest rate on the loan.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés anual del préstamo.

inputs.label: Remaining Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: The number of months remaining on the original loan schedule.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of months remaining on the original loan schedule.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Orijinal kredi planında kalan ay sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der verbleibenden Monate des ursprünglichen Darlehensplans.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de mois restants sur l'échéancier initial du prêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de meses restantes del calendario original del préstamo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الأشهر المتبقية على جدول القرض الأصلي.

inputs.label: Lump Sum Payment
inputs.businessContext: The amount you plan to pay toward the principal to recast the mortgage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount you plan to pay toward the principal to recast the mortgage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mortgage'i yeniden yapılandırmak için anaparaya ödemeyi planladığınız tutar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Betrag, den Sie zur Tilgung des Kapitals zahlen möchten, um die Hypothek neu zu berechnen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant que vous prévoyez payer sur le principal pour recalculer le prêt hypothécaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad que planea pagar al capital para reestructurar la hipoteca.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ الذي تخطط لدفعه مقابل أصل الدين لإعادة صياغة الرهن العقاري.

inputs.label: Recast Fee
inputs.businessContext: The fee charged by the lender for recasting the mortgage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The fee charged by the lender for recasting the mortgage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Borç verenin mortgage'i yeniden yapılandırmak için aldığı ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die vom Kreditgeber für die Neuberechnung der Hypothek erhobene Gebühr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais facturés par le prêteur pour le recalcul du prêt hypothécaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Comisión que cobra el prestamista por reestructurar la hipoteca.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرسوم التي يتقاضاها المقرض لإعادة صياغة الرهن العقاري.
